sources.cleaned_content:
Q2M LEATHERBRUSH

Category: Interior / Accessories

A fully natural, safe leather brush with an ergonomically designed handle.

Q2M LeatherBrush is designed for safe and effective cleaning of all types of automotive leather. It combines natural horsehair bristles with a wooden handle shaped for comfort and control during regular leather maintenance.

Product Image: https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/productmain_1700x1645px_q2m_leatherbrush_2020-1024x991.png

Banner Image: https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/2500x1600q2mleatherbrush1-1920x1152.webp

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

01. What is Q2M LeatherBrush designed for?
Cleaning and maintaining all types of automotive leather.

02. Is it safe on delicate leather?
Yes, the natural horsehair bristles are gentle and safe.

03. Does the handle scratch interior surfaces?
No, the handle has rounded edges to prevent damage.

04. Can it be used with any leather cleaner?
Yes, it is compatible with all leather cleaning products.

05. Is it comfortable to use when wet?
Yes, the handle is shaped to provide a good grip even when wet.

sources.page_title: Gyeon Q2M LeatherBrush - For Leather & Textile Surfaces - Polished Bliss
sources.cleaned_content:
Gyeon Q2M LeatherBrush

Brand: Gyeon

Price: £6.00

Availability: Out of stock

Product Image: https://www.polishedbliss.co.uk/cdn/shop/products/gyeon-q2m-leatherbrush_1119x1119.jpg?v=1603310754

We Say

The soft-bristled Gyeon Q2M LeatherBrush is the perfect tool for agitating products like Gyeon Q2M LeatherCleaner Mild and Gyeon Q2M VinylCleaner, as it gently lifts away ingrained dirt and grime from delicate interior surfaces (textiles and trims) without marking them.

Key Features

Bristle/Pile Length: 17 mm (Approximate Value)
Chemically Resistant: Yes (Avoid Strong Chemicals)
Softness: 8/10 (Compared To Others)

Description

The Gyeon Q2M LeatherBrush features a generous quantity of soft natural bristles set into an ergonomically-shaped wooden handle, and enables interior surfaces (alcantara and leather as well as standard upholstery and trims) to be scrubbed safely as they are cleaned.

Specification

Bristle/Pile Length: 17 mm
Chemically Resistant: Yes
Construction: Natural bristles and hardwood handle
Softness: 8

How To Use

Care instructions: (i) after use, rinse under fresh running water (using your fingertips to tease out dust and any fibres) and then allow to dry naturally, and; (ii) store in a dry, dust-free environment while not in use (lidded plastic storage boxes are ideal in this respect).
